column3: Remove eval() of DOM attributes (arbitrary code execution)
Escape attribute/contenteditable values (XSS / CSS injection)
FONT disable-check tests wrong variable (size instead of font)
firstWeightPosition undefined when weight not found in weightselection
Auto-fit text does not reflow on window/container resize
Debounce keyup-driven re-fit (layout thrashing / bouncing text)
OpenType features are not composable (each overwrites the rest)
README documents weightselections but code reads weightselection
Build is unreproducible (EOL grunt deps, no lockfile, undeclared jQuery, wrong main)
Eliminate leaked/implicit globals and shared mutable counters
Custom controls have no role/tabindex/keyboard/ARIA
contenteditable editor lacks label/role; placeholder is real content
Features dropdown: no outside-click/Escape close or focus management
State signalled by color only (no aria-pressed/aria-selected)
No tests and no test framework; logic is untestable
Monolithic 670-line function with heavy copy-paste duplication
Remove dead 7-parameter function signature
Undefined options variable makes guard always true
Duplicate -moz-font-feature-settings with legacy =1 syntax
Dead vendor prefixes on font-feature-settings
Hardcoded private 'Fakta Grotesk' fallback leaks foundry default
OpenType feature mislabels and duplicate labels
Missing OpenType features and stylistic sets
Size slider range hardcoded 15-215; out-of-range size clamped
bigtext fits before web fonts load (FOUT/FOIT)
Empty style tag injected per tester into body
Committed build artifacts, stale min.js, dead 'scripts copy.js'; uglify off
prefers-reduced-motion ignored (slider animate:true)
Loose == equality and array-to-empty-string comparisons
font-style: initial used instead of normal for off-state
align not validated against allowed values
Dead device/vendor detection (isMobile/iphone/prefix unused)
Non-standard <smcp> element in disclaimer link
Fragile .parent().parent().find() coupling, uncached selectors
README gaps and missing JSDoc
return false mid-init leaves DOM partially initialized
